items.scenario: You are a new member of the city science museum, and you signed up for a members-only guided tour next Saturday. A scheduling conflict means you can no longer attend that session, but you would still like to join a different tour during the same month.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Pemberton. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain why you cannot attend the scheduled tour
Ask which other tour dates remain open
Request confirmation once a new slot is booked
items.subject: Switching my members-only guided tour slot

items.scenario: You are a senior majoring in linguistics who hopes to take Dr. Sorenson's graduate seminar on language acquisition this fall. The registration system blocks undergraduates from enrolling automatically, but the course description notes that exceptions are sometimes granted with the instructor's written approval.
items.direction: Write an email to Dr. Sorenson. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain why the seminar fits your academic goals
Ask how to obtain enrollment approval
items.subject: Enrolling in your graduate seminar as an undergraduate

items.scenario: You bought a pair of wireless noise-cancelling headphones eight months ago, and they are still covered by the manufacturer's warranty. Recently the left earcup stopped charging entirely, even with a new cable, and the online help page directed you to contact a support specialist by email.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Lindqvist. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the problem with the headphones
Explain what you have already tried
Request a repair or a replacement
items.subject: Warranty help for headphones that stopped charging

items.scenario: Your favorite folk festival is happening next month, and you found a small cabin near the venue that would be far cheaper if two people shared it. You want to invite your friend Hannah, who mentioned earlier this year that she really loves live music.
items.direction: Write an email to Hannah. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the cabin and your festival plan
Suggest how the two of you could split the cost
Ask whether she can decide by next week
items.subject: Splitting a cabin for the folk festival weekend
